chk_obfuscation: Enable Code Obfuscation (Randomize vars + junk code to evade AV)
chk_signing: Enable Code Signing (Optional, requires local SignTool and a PFX certificate)
msg_signing_hint: Note: The signing password is used only for the current build and is not saved to history.
chk_webhook: Enable Webhook Reporting (Push Launcher results to your notification channel)
msg_webhook_hint: Note: Launcher sends results asynchronously after scanning, without blocking main flow.
chk_bsod: Fake BSOD — Show a realistic Windows blue screen when target not found
chk_audio: Prank Audio — Play beep sequences in background
chk_mouse_drift: Mouse Drift — Make the cursor wander briefly
chk_anti_analysis: Enable Anti-Analysis — Detect sandbox/debugger/VM, show benign behavior and exit if detected
msg_anti_analysis_hint: Checks: CPU cores / RAM / disk / uptime / MAC prefix / debugger / analysis tools (11 indicators)
msg_confirm_exit: Are you sure you want to exit?
